cards.front: What is the primary key attribute in the Employee table?
What is the purpose of the EMPNO attribute in the Employee table?
What data type is typically used for the EMPNO attribute?
Is EMPNO an attribute that can be repeated in the Employee table?
cards.back: No, it is a unique identifier

cards.front: Why is EMPNO used in database management systems?
cards.back: To uniquely identify each employee and prevent data duplication
